  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    sysutils/smartmontools Makefile 
    sysutils/smartmontools/files smart.in 
  Log:

    kern.disks in place of ls /dev/da*[0-9].

  Submitted by:   Dmitry Morozovsky <marck@freebsd.org> (maintainer)
